name: jetski-postman-tests
description: Automated API testing for Jetski SaaS using Postman Collections + Newman CLI

scripts.test:dev: newman run Jetski-Jornadas.postman_collection.json -e environments/Dev.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export results/report-dev.html
scripts.test:rn01: newman run Jetski-Jornadas.postman_collection.json -e environments/Local.postman_environment.json -d data/rn01-tolerance-rounding-tests.csv --folder '3. Cliente Walk-in (Operador)' --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export results/rn01-report.html
scripts.test:negative: newman run Jetski-Jornadas.postman_collection.json -e environments/Local.postman_environment.json --folder '6. Jornadas Negativas - Testes RBAC' --reporters cli

author: Jetski Team
